verses.text: Oded' tapa Azariah' tungah Pasian' kha hong tung hi

Tua ciangin Asa a dawntuah dingin amah pai-in ama kiangah, “Asa, leh Judah mite leh Benjamin mite aw, ka thu ngai un. Note amah tawh na om laiteng uh note tawh Topa hong om hi. Amah na zon' uh leh amah na mu ding uh a, ahih hangin amah na nusiat uh leh amah in note hong nusia ding hi
Hun saupi sung Israel mite, Pasian man tawh omlo, thu a hilh siampi tawh omlo, thukham tawh omlo uh hi
Ahih hangin a lungkham uh ciangin Israel Pasian, Topa' lamah kihei uh a, amah zongin amaute in amah a mu uh hi
Tua hun lai-in nasemin mite a zinsuk a zintohna uhah lungmuan'na omlo a, gam khempeuhah buaina om hi
Pasian in lungkhamna nam khempeuh tawh buaisak ahih manin minam khat leh minam khat, khuapi khat leh khuapi khat kido-in amaute kitamkham uh hi
Ahih hangin nang, hang in! Na nasepna thaman hong kipia ding ahih manin na khut zawsak kei in,” a ci hi

Asa in Oded' tapa Azariah' thugenkholh, hih thute a zak ciangin amah a lungsim hong hangin, Judah gam khempeuh leh Benjamin leh Efraim mualtung gam panin a laksa khuapite panin a kihhuai milimte lakhia a, Topa' biakinn mai-a om Topa' biakna tau a puah hi

Tua ciangin amah in Judah leh Benjamin mi khempeuh, leh Efraim, Manasseh, leh Simeon sung panin amaute kiangah a peemte zong a khawm hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa a Pasian in amah a ompihna thu amaute in a muh uh ciangin Israel-te kiang panin mi tampi tak ama kiangah tai uh hi
Asa' uk kum sawmlengana a kha thumna sungin Jerusalem-ah amaute kikhawm uh hi
Tua ni-in amaute in galsung panin a ciahpih uh nate sung panin bawngtal za sagih leh tuu tul sagih tawh Topa' tungah biakna a pia uh hi
Tua ciangin a lungsim khempeuh uh leh a nuntakna khempeuh uh tawh a pu a pate uh' Pasian, Topa a zon' ding uh
leh Israel Pasian, Topa a zonglo peuhmah, a moi ahi a, a ham ahi a, numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin a kithahna ding uh thuciamna khat a bawl uh hi
Amaute in awging pha, otna, peengkulte, leh sakite tawh Topa' tungah kiciamna a bawl uh hi

Tua ciangin Judah mi khempeuh tua kiciamna-ah lungdam uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a lungsim khempeuh uh tawh kiciamin deihna taktak tawh amah zong uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in amah mu uh a, Topa in a kiim uhah amaute galdaihna a pia hi
Ama nu Maakah in Asherah milim dingin a kihhuai milim khat a bawlna hangin kumpipa' nu hihna za panin kumpi Asa in a nu a lakhia hi. Asa in a nu' milim phuksakin satnen a, Kidron lui-ah a hal hi
Ahih hangin Israel gamsung panin mual dawna biakpiaknate kilakhia lo hi. Ahi zongin ama hunsung tawntung Asa' lungsim paubaanglo hi
Tua ciangin amah in a pa' apsa letsongte leh ama apsa letsongte, ngun leh kham, leh nazatte, Topa' biakinn-ah paipih hi
Asa' uk kum sawmthumlenga ciangdong galkidona om nawnlo hi.
